summary.summary: Imported via zip fallback, file count: 1441

core_modules.description: Primary public aggregation module exposing high-level statsmodels functionality through stable imports.
Core linear regression estimators and result objects; one of the most commonly used entry modules.
Generalized Linear Models framework with families/links support.
Discrete response models used heavily for classification/count modeling.
High-level time-series API surface for ARIMA, state space, VAR, decomposition, and diagnostics.
Modern ARIMA interface and fitting/prediction workflow.
State space seasonal ARIMA with exogenous regressors, central for forecasting use-cases.
Statistical testing and inference API aggregator (power, proportions, diagnostics, multicomp, etc.).
Formula-based model constructors integrating patsy-style syntax.
Built-in dataset loaders useful for demos/tests and MCP quickstart flows.

cli_commands.name: python -m statsmodels.tools.print_version
cli_commands.description: Print environment/version information; useful diagnostic utility but not a full product CLI.
